reviews_data.review_text: I absolutely love Rising Tea. It’s such a beautiful experience, intimate, peaceful and relaxing. The owner Margaret is wonderful, so knowledgeable and offers an intentional tea experience which is unique in Charlotte. Thank you so much.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for your poetic review.  It means the world to me.  Thank you for slowing down with us.

Here you go!

---

**⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐**

In a city that never slows down, Rising Tea & Alchemy is the exhale you didn't know you needed.

I honestly didn't know what to expect walking in, but I left feeling genuinely reset. The tea service is a whole experience. It's the kind of thing that makes you put your phone down without even thinking about it.

It's warm and intentional in a way that feels real, not curated.
Bring someone you've been meaning to catch up with. Sit down.

They will pour you something beautiful. You'll leave slower — and better for it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in Tristan.  : )
reviews_data.review_text: Very nice atmosphere and amazing tea!

A wonderful and cozy tea room, right in the middle of Charlotte! The interior is intimate and well decorated, making a fantastic environment to enjoy some tea, and they offer a real quality variety of teas, herbal tisanses, and teaware to enjoy or take home.
Best part by far though, Margaret is a kind and gracious host who was happy to answer any questions I had! Highly recommend stopping in for a visit if you have some time!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Anna, I look forward to having you back in.
reviews_data.review_text: This place is so cute and quaint. Excellent tea selection and a great collection of books for reading or buying! The owner is just a delight to talk with! I so look forward to my next visit!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in and celebrating with us!
reviews_data.review_text: What a delightful way to spend time with my family; no screens, no distractions, simply tea and company. Margaret creates a time out of time experience to refresh our bodies and souls, what a great reset. Thank you!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for coming in.  We enjoyed having you.
reviews_data.review_text: I had the best experience at this tearoom. Not only was my Women's Wellness tea delicious, I found the atmosphere very relaxing. I also bought a couple unique gifts for friends which was a nice surprise. Every aspect of the experience felt curated and intentional. I will definitely be going back.
Excellent tea and atmosphere, lady working there was very nice.
